selection_rationale: S1/OB-fold: 308 RNA + 257 DNA structures; universal ancient fold; strongest dual-binding evidence
DEAD-box helicase: 284 RNA + 56 DNA; universal RNA processing; Alva fragment 3 (P-loop)
Piwi/Argonaute: 75 RNA + 11 DNA; RNA-guided DNA cleavage; direct test of dual mechanism
KH_1: 23 RNA + 10 DNA; classic RNA-binding domain with unexpected DNA structures
tRNA_bind/OB-fold: 14 RNA + 11 DNA; nearly equal binding; pre-LUCA age; in aaRS
RrnaAD/KsgA: 27 RNA + 15 DNA; rRNA methylase with DNA structures; Alva fragment 2 (HhH)
S4: 1689 RNA + 68 DNA; ribosomal protein S4; Alva fragment 10; ancient vocabulary
Topoisom_bac: 8 RNA + 27 DNA; topology enzyme; primarily DNA but RNA structures exist
PUA: 29 RNA + 0 DNA; RNA modification scaffold; clean RNA-only control
TruB_N: 30 RNA + 0 DNA; pseudouridine synthase; clean RNA-only control
SRP54: 17 RNA + 0 DNA; signal recognition particle; translation targeting
SpoU_methylase: 7 RNA + 0 DNA; rRNA 2-O-ribose methyltransferase; RNA-only
UvrD-helicase: 0 RNA + 32 DNA; DNA repair helicase; clean DNA-only control
Phage_integrase: 0 RNA + 33 DNA; site-specific recombination; DNA-only control
DNA_pol_B: 9 RNA + 196 DNA; DNA polymerase B; primarily DNA; RNA from primers
HHH/helix-hairpin-helix: 0 RNA + 8 DNA; Weil-Ktorza 2025 "ambidextrous" motif; Alva fragment 2; DNA-only in PDB but predicted generalist — key thesis test
GTP_EFTU: 390 RNA + 14 DNA; pre-LUCA EF-Tu; core translation; Alva fragment 3 (P-loop)
MutS_V: 1 RNA + 43 DNA; mismatch repair with 1 RNA structure; interesting anomaly
tRNA-synt_1: 16 RNA + 0 DNA; pre-LUCA class I aaRS; Rossmann fold (Alva fragment 7)
tRNA-synt_2: 12 RNA + 0 DNA; class II aaRS core; translation control
Ribosomal_L6: 1663 RNA + 53 DNA; ribosomal protein; mostly ribosome co-crystals
